name: Boreo Oyj
summary: Boreo Oyj imports and sells electronic components and tools to Finland, Russia, and the Baltics. The company offers 3D printing products, antennas and accessories, audio/video products, cables and accessories, converters, KVMs, networking products, PC and car accessories, telecommunication and power products, wall outlets, and AVs. It also provides batteries, chemicals, connectors, cooling products and fans, development kits, electric accessories, LED components, lighting and RF products, mechanical components, passives, relays, semiconductors, sounders, switches, tapes, and literature products. In addition, the company offers baking ovens, cable cutting and strip tools, cleaning and dry storage products, clothing and personal protection products, component counter and lead handling products, crimping dies and machines, dispensers, fume extractors, labels, lamps, microscopes, mounting accessories, PCBs and accessories, packing products, safety and soldering products, ultrasonic cleaners, and weighting products, as well as ESD and protection products. Further, it provides air quality/flow meters, bags and carrying cases, battery testers, cable locators and testers, calipers, clamp and distance meters, component and earth ground testers, electrical and FO testers, endoscopes, frequency counters, function generators, installation and insulation testers, IR windows, lasers, LAN and machine testers, light intensity meters, loggers, multimeters and its related software, oscilloscopes, phase rotation indicators, power quality meters, process calibrators and precision pressure gauges, radiation meters, solar power and sound level meters, power analyzers, surface testers, tachometers, temperature/humidity meters, test leads and probes, thermal cameras and accessories, vibration testers, and visual inspection and other tools. It sells products through stores and catalogues. The company was formerly known as Yleiselektroniikka Oyj. Boreo Oyj was founded in 1969 and is based in Espoo, Finland.
